title: polypodium tetragonum var. megalodum
intro: Polypodium tetragonum var. megalodum is a variety of the Polypodium tetragonum fern, commonly known as the house-leek or polypody fern. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polypodium tetragonum var. megalodum include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and promote wound healing. It is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, with some herbalists also using it in salves and poultices for topical application.
